description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurta from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsGrey with navy blue and pink all over printed kurta, roundish V neck with navy blue binding, top stitched and navy blue piped patch at neck, three quarter sleeves with top stitched and navy blue piped band at hem, vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
